title: Squirrel Removal in Plainview, NY | $900 - $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Plainview, Long Island. Humane extraction, exclusion & attic restoration. Licensed experts serving Plainview homeowners. Call today!
intro: Squirrels invading your Plainview home can cause serious damage to attics, insulation, and wiring. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Plainview and surrounding Long Island communities, protecting your property from these persistent pests. Our humane removal methods ensure squirrels are safely extracted and prevented from returning.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Long Island homeowners, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with proven squirrel exclusion techniques tailored to Plainview's residential architecture. Our licensed technicians provide same-day service, comprehensive attic inspections, and guaranteed exclusion work to keep your home squirrel-free year-round.
localContext: Plainview's tree-lined streets and proximity to parks like Plainview-Old Bethpage Community Park create ideal conditions for squirrel populations seeking access to warm attics, especially in the area's many mid-century ranch and split-level homes. The mature oak and maple trees common throughout neighborhoods near Old Bethpage Road and Manetto Hill provide easy access points to rooflines and soffits.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Plainview?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Plainview typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, complete exclusion work sealing all entry points, and minor attic cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Plainview attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the morning and evening, visible entry holes near the roofline or soffits, chewed wood or wiring, droppings in the attic, and squirrels running along power lines to your roof. Plainview homeowners often notice increased activity during fall when squirrels seek warm shelter for winter.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Plainview home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for Plainview residents. The initial trapping process typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels present. Once all animals are removed, we immediately seal entry points to prevent re-entry. Most projects are completed within one week from initial contact.

faqs.question: Do you repair damage caused by squirrels in Plainview homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive attic restoration services including insulation replacement, contaminated material removal, wire repair consultation, and entry point reconstruction. Our team assesses all damage during the initial inspection and can handle everything from minor soffit repairs to complete insulation restoration for Plainview homeowners.
